match_cut.name: Match Cut
match_cut.description: Object/shape in frame A becomes object/shape in frame B with identical composition
match_cut.prompt_keywords: match cut, seamless transition, shape continuity
match_cut.dream_use: Scene shifts that feel logically connected despite being spatially impossible

fluid_morph.name: Fluid Morph
fluid_morph.description: Continuous deformation from one scene to another without a cut point. Objects seamlessly transform into other objects
fluid_morph.prompt_keywords: morphing, fluid transition, seamless transformation, one thing becoming another
fluid_morph.dream_use: The way dream environments shift without explanation — a room becomes a field becomes an ocean

environmental_collapse.name: Environmental Collapse
environmental_collapse.description: Scene elements disappear, blur, or shrink, transitioning through destruction
environmental_collapse.prompt_keywords: crumbling walls, disappearing objects, collapsing environment, dissolving scene
environmental_collapse.dream_use: Nightmares, anxiety dreams, the feeling of a dream fading or being forgotten

elemental_threshold.name: Elemental Threshold
elemental_threshold.description: Wind, fire, or water events mark the passage from one state to another
elemental_threshold.prompt_keywords: sudden wind, mist rising, rain beginning, fire igniting, elemental transition
elemental_threshold.dream_use: Transitions that feel organic and natural — the dream shifts because the wind blows

grafted_entry.name: Grafted Dream Entry
grafted_entry.description: Fantasy begins within reality seamlessly; the viewer does not notice the transition
grafted_entry.prompt_keywords: imperceptible shift, seamless reality to dream, gradual unreality
grafted_entry.dream_use: Dreams that start from waking reality — lying in bed, then suddenly somewhere else

tunnel_passage.name: Tunnel/Passage
tunnel_passage.description: Physical movement through a threshold space with gradual color/light shift
tunnel_passage.prompt_keywords: tunnel, corridor, passage, threshold, gradual color change, entering another world

material_shift.name: Material Shift
material_shift.description: Real-world textures replaced by handmade/constructed textures
material_shift.prompt_keywords: cardboard, cellophane, felt, handmade, craft, lo-fi textures
material_shift.dream_use: Dreams that feel constructed, childlike, or deliberately artificial

parallel_speed.name: Parallel Speed Editing
parallel_speed.description: Same event shown at different speeds across intercutting layers
parallel_speed.prompt_keywords: multi-speed, parallel timelines, time dilation across layers

ultra_slow_motion.name: Ultra Slow Motion
ultra_slow_motion.description: 1000+ fps for key moments of awe, beauty, or terror
ultra_slow_motion.prompt_keywords: extreme slow motion, time frozen, every detail visible, stretched moment

reverse_chronology.name: Reverse Chronology
reverse_chronology.prompt_keywords: reverse, backwards, rewinding, time flowing backwards

non_chronological_drift.name: Non-Chronological Drift
non_chronological_drift.description: Time has no direction; scenes associate by emotion rather than sequence
non_chronological_drift.prompt_keywords: associative editing, emotional connection, non-linear, time without direction

subjective_expansion.name: Subjective Time Expansion
subjective_expansion.description: Minimal motion and sound stretch a brief event into contemplation
subjective_expansion.prompt_keywords: still, quiet, contemplative, time stretching, lingering moment, meditative

repetition_variation.name: Repetition with Variation
repetition_variation.description: Same event replays with alterations, eroding temporal certainty
repetition_variation.prompt_keywords: repeating, loop, same but different, deja vu, slight changes each time

temporal_collision.name: Temporal Collision
temporal_collision.description: Characters from different time periods share the same physical space
temporal_collision.prompt_keywords: time collision, past and present overlapping, multiple eras in one space

saturation_boost.name: Dream Saturation Boost
saturation_boost.description: Dream world uses maximum saturation vs muted reality
saturation_boost.prompt_keywords: vivid, oversaturated, vibrant colors, hyper-real color

temperature_coding.name: Color-Temperature Level Coding
temperature_coding.description: Each dream level/zone has a locked color grade
temperature_coding.prompt_keywords: distinct color grade, warm amber, cool blue, specific color temperature per scene

chromatic_anchor.name: Chromatic Anchor
chromatic_anchor.description: Single high-saturation element in otherwise desaturated world
chromatic_anchor.prompt_keywords: one bright color element, color focal point, desaturated except for one element

mood_breathing.name: Color-Mood Breathing
mood_breathing.description: Palette shifts dynamically with emotional tone within a single scene
mood_breathing.prompt_keywords: color shifting with emotion, warm to cool transition, palette breathing

night_in_day.name: Night-in-Day Contradiction
night_in_day.description: Nighttime lighting applied to daytime scenes
night_in_day.prompt_keywords: contradictory lighting, dark shadows in bright scenes, impossible light sources

floating.name: Floating Camera
floating.description: Camera moves as if unattached to human operator; drifts with dream inertia
floating.prompt_keywords: floating camera, drifting, weightless camera movement, ethereal movement

panic_handheld.name: Panic Handheld
panic_handheld.description: Camera instability motivated by character's emotional state
panic_handheld.prompt_keywords: shaky camera, unstable, frantic, handheld, disoriented movement

creeping_dolly.name: Creeping Dolly
creeping_dolly.description: Extremely slow forward movement toward a source of dread
creeping_dolly.prompt_keywords: slow push in, creeping forward, approaching dread, slow dolly toward

architectural_reveal.name: Architectural Reveal
architectural_reveal.description: Wide lens reveals impossible architecture in a single composition
architectural_reveal.prompt_keywords: wide angle, impossible architecture, vast reveal, scale reveal

jitter_wobble.name: Jitter Wobble
jitter_wobble.description: Surfaces and edges breathe and undulate, nothing holds still
jitter_wobble.prompt_keywords: undulating, breathing surfaces, unstable edges, organic movement

continuous_pan_discontinuous.name: Continuous Pan Through Discontinuous Space
continuous_pan_discontinuous.description: Camera pans left in one room and arrives in a different scene
continuous_pan_discontinuous.prompt_keywords: continuous pan, space shifting, one room becoming another, impossible pan

impossible_geometry.name: Impossible Geometry
impossible_geometry.description: Penrose stairs, folding cities, paradoxical architecture
impossible_geometry.prompt_keywords: impossible architecture, Escher-like, folding space, paradoxical geometry

environmental_erasure.name: Environmental Erasure
environmental_erasure.description: Objects and people disappearing from the frame
environmental_erasure.prompt_keywords: vanishing, disappearing objects, fading people, erasing environment

elemental_contradiction.name: Elemental Contradiction
elemental_contradiction.description: Fire and water coexisting; wind without cause
elemental_contradiction.prompt_keywords: fire in water, rain inside, impossible elements, wind from nowhere

detail_overload.name: Detail Overload
detail_overload.description: Extreme density of visual detail creating overwhelm
detail_overload.prompt_keywords: densely detailed, overwhelming detail, every surface textured, visual density

reflection_fragmentation.name: Reflection Fragmentation
reflection_fragmentation.description: Multiple versions of a character visible in mirrors and glass simultaneously
reflection_fragmentation.prompt_keywords: multiple reflections, fragmented identity, mirrors showing different versions
